title: PLACE A PET - 211info
text: FERN'S PLACE PLACE A PET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary foster care for cats, dogs, and other animals. Services are based on availability and provided by volunteers. Eligibility: Individuals entering inpatient treatment: Medical or substance use disorder treatment Pets: Proof of vaccination Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and complete online intake form. Email is the preferred method of communication. FEES: No fees for foster service. Applicants are expected to provide all necessary care items for their pet, including food, medication, and essential supplies. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Pet Boarding/Sitting Services * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Pet Boarding/Sitting Services * Substance Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
